title: Maudpack
description: Fabric Modpack featuring Create, ComputerCraft, Farmer's Delight, and tons of QoL improvements, configured for the Coney Poney MC Servers
body:
[Maudpack](https://github.com/coney-poney/maudpack) is my second go around with making a pack specifically for the [Coney Poney](https://discord.gg/D4z7AHwWqD) MC Servers.

It's been in the works for quite a few weeks now, but I think it's time I finally release it!

This pack is mainly centered around a few bigger mods (Create, CC:C Restitched, Farmer's Delight), bolstered with a large selection of mods that add extra flair, QoL improvements, or both! 

I've also included Tinkerer's Smithing, which greatly overhauls the tool/weapon/armor maintenance system.

And, using Fabrication, I've completely disabled Mending.

The modpack is pre-configured with server entries to the SurvivalMod and CreativeMod servers.

Some special aspects of this mod include the packed-in Figura Pony models by [wtrClover](https://twitter.com/wtrClover/), these will be kept up-to-date from release-to-release, but if you want the latest templates, check out the [Figura Ponies Repository on Github](https://github.com/coney-poney/figura-ponies), or for the finished models, check out the [Figura Ponies Community Repository](https://github.com/coney-poney/figura-ponies-community).

Mod Credits:

[Xaero](https://www.curseforge.com/members/xaero96) - [Xaero's Minimap](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-minimap) and [Xaero's Worldmap](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-world-map)
